title: aconitum × setosum
intro: Aconitum × setosum, also known as the woolly monk's hood, is a hybrid flowering plant in the Aconitum genus, which is native to the mountainous regions of East Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, as it contains aconitine, a powerful alkaloid with analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, making it effective against pain, fever, and infections. The health benefits of Aconitum × setosum include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and treating conditions such as rheumatism and arthritis. In herbal preparations, Aconitum × setosum is often dried, powdered, or made into tinctures or infusions, although it is essential to use extreme caution due to its toxicity and potential side effects.
